title: Quetemoor the Sub-Elder
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Quetemoor''', a pallid, lantern-jawed [[Human/Legends|Human]], headed a [[Mugaari]] crime family that held sway over much of [[Galactic City/Legends|Imperial City's]] underworld. Properly known as '''Quetemoor the Sub-Elder''', he shared power with his older sister [[Quetemoor the Elder]], his father [[Quetemoor the Venerable]], and his nephew [[Quetemoor the Younger]], as well as family members from other lineages.<ref name="CCW">''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''</ref>

Though he worked out a peace with [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor's]] overarching [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] syndicate, Quetemoor constantly battled his smaller rivals for a bigger piece of the underworld action, reserving a special hatred for the crime lord [[Beuga Odell]].<ref name="CCW" />

Though Quetemoor could be brutally sadistic to his enemies, he had a robust sense of humor and a booming laugh. Freelance employees who amused Quetemoor would be placed on his list of "grimacers" and receive plum assignments from his [[Majordomo/Legends|majordomo]]. He owned a customized bulk [[Transport/Legends|transport]], the ''[[Cold Front]]''.<ref name="CCW" />

==Behind the scenes==
Quetemoor is described in the text as being a "Human", yet his stats call him a "Mugaari", along with "new species" stats being presented for the Mugaari. It is also made clear that the Mugaari resent Humans. A possible fix is that Mugaari are near-humans, and their resentment is towards baseline humans.<ref name="CCW" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-01-XX -->''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'' {{1stm}}
